Perf Check: Response < 300ms; email delivery async; no blocking
Security Check: Email validated (RFC format); CSRF/honeypot protection; rate limiting (3 attempts per IP per hour); double opt-in enforced; DPDPA 2023 consent recorded; no existing subscriber silently ignored
Functional Check: Valid email → confirmation email sent; duplicate email → 200 without re-adding; invalid email → 400; rate limiting triggers; consent timestamp stored
Notes: Double opt-in is required for DPDPA 2023 compliance — verify confirmation email is sent

Security Check: Unsubscribe token validated (server-side); single-use token; no CSRF unsubscription possible; no email required in body (token only); unsubscribe honoured immediately per CAN-SPAM/DPDPA
Functional Check: Valid token → unsubscribed and confirmation page shown; invalid token → 400; already unsubscribed → 200 idempotent
Notes: Unsubscribe must be honoured within 10 business days per DPDPA — verify immediate effect

Perf Check: Response < 500ms; email send async; no blocking UI
Security Check: Input sanitized (no XSS/HTML injection); rate limiting (5 per IP per hour); honeypot or reCAPTCHA; no email harvesting; contact data not stored beyond delivery; CSRF token
Functional Check: Form submits; admin email received; auto-reply to sender; rate limiting triggers; invalid payload returns 400; spam bot honeypot filters correctly
Notes: Test end-to-end — admin email must arrive; verify auto-reply sends; check rate limiting

Perf Check: Response < 500ms; file upload async; no blocking
Security Check: Auth required — reject unauthenticated requests; CSRF token; file upload: type validation by MIME bytes + size limit; filename sanitized; ticket ID not guessable (UUID); rate limiting per user
Functional Check: Auth guard works; ticket created with UUID; file attachment processed; confirmation email with ticket ID sent; rate limiting triggers; unauthenticated returns 401
Notes: 🔴 File upload must validate MIME bytes not just extension — prevent malware upload

Perf Check: Response < 300ms; WhatsApp API async; no blocking
Security Check: Phone number validated (E.164 format); rate limiting; consent recorded per DPDPA; WhatsApp Business API credentials in env only
Functional Check: Valid phone → WhatsApp opt-in message sent; invalid phone → 400; duplicate subscription → 200 idempotent; consent stored
Notes: WhatsApp opt-in requires explicit consent per WhatsApp Business Policy — verify consent flow

Perf Check: Webhook processed < 2s; async job queue for slow tasks
Security Check: WhatsApp webhook signature verified (X-Hub-Signature-256); replay attack protection (timestamp check); idempotent message processing; no PII logged; HTTPS only
Functional Check: Signature verification works; valid webhook events processed correctly; invalid signature returns 403; duplicate message IDs deduped
Notes: 🔴 Verify X-Hub-Signature-256 on every request — missing verification = spoofed messages accepted

Perf Check: Response < 300ms; email send async via Resend; no blocking
Security Check: Auth/cron secret required — not public endpoint; recipient email validated; email template sanitized (no injection); rate limiting per alert type; no PII in logs
Content Check: Alert content accurate; subject line clear; unsubscribe link present in email; brand consistent
Functional Check: Alert sent to correct recipient; Resend API error handled; invalid payload returns 400; rate limiting prevents alert spam
Notes: Protect endpoint with CRON_SECRET or admin auth — must not be triggerable by public

Security Check: Phone number E.164 validated; TRAI DND registry check required (India); consent recorded; rate limiting; SMS provider credentials in env only
Functional Check: Valid phone → SMS opt-in confirmation sent; DND number rejected; invalid phone → 400; consent stored
Notes: ⚠️ Indian TRAI DND compliance mandatory — scrub against DND registry before sending SMS

Security Check: Push subscription object validated; VAPID keys in env only; subscription endpoint validated (not arbitrary URL); auth optional
Functional Check: Valid push subscription stored; duplicate subscription handled; invalid subscription object returns 400
Notes: Validate push subscription endpoint domain — prevent SSRF via malicious subscription object

Security Check: Returns only VAPID public key — never private key; no auth required; rate limiting
Functional Check: Returns correct VAPID public key; private key never in response; rate limiting works
Notes: Confirm only public VAPID key is returned — private key must stay server-side only

Security Check: Auth required; input sanitized; CRM API credentials in env only; rate limiting; DPDPA consent check before storing PII
Functional Check: Contact record created in CRM; duplicate contact handled; CRM API error handled gracefully; auth guard works
Notes: Verify DPDPA consent is checked before storing contact PII in CRM
